name: python3-geoip2
title: python3-geoip2
summary: Python geoip2 API for web services and databases
description:
Python geoip2 API for web services and databases
This package provides an API for the GeoIP2 web services and databases. The
API also works with MaxMind’s free GeoLite2 databases.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-geoip2 because Python geoip2 API for web services and databases.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-geoip2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-geoip2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-geoip2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
